step_rationale: Circulating apoptosis-autophagy lncRNA; diagnostic marker of plaque inflammation and macrophage stress.
mechanism: AJ006998.2 circulating levels reflect macrophage apoptosis and autophagy dysregulation in destabilizing atherosclerotic plaques.

references.title: Dysregulated Circulating Apoptosis- and Autophagy-Related lncRNAs as Diagnostic Markers in Coronary Artery Disease.
